data.title: Learn about various NFT art platforms on Tezos, including Objkt, Teia, Bootloader, and Skurpy, with unique features and community-driven endeavors.
data.description: Explore a variety of NFT art markets on Tezos, including Objkt's main hub, as well as emerging platforms like Teia, Bootloader, and Skurpy. These platforms showcase distinctive features and community-driven projects, contributing to the vibrant NFT ecosystem on Tezos.

data.title: Mirandus confronts a new danger with 'Desperate Measures' event by Gala Games, offering rewards like $GALA tokens and rare artifacts.
data.description: Gala Games introduces the 'Desperate Measures' event within the game Mirandus, prompting players to confront a disruptive entity and secure prizes such as $GALA tokens and exclusive artifacts.

data.title: Investors with losses over $50,000 in V.F. Corporation from Oct 30, 2023 to May 20, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: Investors who incurred losses of over $50,000 in VFC between October 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025, are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner, James (Josh) Wilson to reach out directly for a discussion on potential options.

data.title: Head of Payments at Bank of Canada warns: Establish stablecoin rules or risk falling behind as digital assets surge.
data.description: Canada's central bank's head of payments, Ron Morrow, has urged regulators to establish a framework for stablecoins to avoid falling behind.

data.title: Vancouver-based real estate company, Madison Pacific Properties Inc., announces changes to its Board of Directors on Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: A real estate company based in Vancouver, Madison Pacific Properties Inc. (the Company) (TSX: MPC and MPC.C), made an announcement on September 18, 2025, regarding changes in its Board of Directors.

data.title: ProCap BTC's Bitcoin holdings appreciate by over $60M in under 90 days, as its exec team is established. Form S-4 filed.
data.description: ProCap Financial has officially submitted Form S-4 as ProCap BTC pushes forward with its strategic plans swiftly. The New York-based ProCap BTC, LLC, a firm specializing in bitcoin financial services, disclosed significant achievements in its proposed operations. This announcement was made on September 18, 2025, through PRNewswire. The Company indicated notable progress in its strategy implementation.

data.title: 120 sanitation workers at Reworld-SEMASS join Teamsters Local 59 for better union contract.
data.description: In West Wareham, Massachusetts, on September 18, 2025, 120 sanitation workers employed at Reworld-SEMASS made the decision to form a union by joining Teamsters Local 59. This group of workers consists of auxiliary operators, equipment operators, loader operators, and rail employees. The workers took this step to collectively pursue a strong union contract that would address their needs and rights in the workplace. Joining Local 59 will enable them to bargain collectively and potentially negotiate better working conditions and benefits.

data.title: Lennar's Q3 2025: Net earnings per diluted share $2.29 ($2.00 excl gains), $591M net earnings, 12% new orders increase to 23,004 homes.
data.description: Key highlights from the third quarter of 2025 show significant growth compared to the same period last year. Net earnings per diluted share saw a rise to $2.29 ($2.00 without mark-to-market gains on technology investments), with a total net earning of $591 million. New orders surged by 12% to reach 23,004 homes. The backlog for the quarter stood at 16,953 homes with a substantial dollar value. This indicates a strong performance and positive momentum for the company.

data.title: First Horizon Bank sponsors 2025 Nashville Half Marathon & 5K, highlighting active lifestyle and community pride. #PRNewswire
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on September 18, 2025, Run Nash disclosed that First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN) will be the Title Sponsor of the 2025 Nashville Half Marathon & 5K. This reaffirms their enduring collaboration that promotes healthy living and local unity in Music City.

data.title: Fathom Holdings plans primary offering of common stock with underwriters having 45-day option; use proceeds for general purposes.
data.description: CARY, N.C., Sept. 18, 2025 - Fathom Holdings Inc., a technology-driven real estate services platform traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTHM, revealed plans for a new primary offering of its common stock through an underwritten public offering. The Company intends to provide underwriters with a 45-day option to purchase up to an additional 15% of the common stock shares offered. The completion of the offering is contingent on market conditions and other factors, with no definitive timeline or details on the final size or terms disclosed. Proceeds from the offering will be utilized for general corporate purposes.

data.title: Ventas Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share, payable on October 16, 2025, to shareholders of record by Sept 30.
data.description: Chicago (BUSINESS WIRE) - Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per common share, to be paid out on October 16, 2025, to stockholders as of September 30, 2025. Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) is a key S&P 500 real estate investment trust focusing on creating exceptional environments for the expanding aging population. With about 1,400 properties, Ventas aims to cater to the needs of this demographic.

data.title: Stock market hits record highs led by Nvidia, Fed news. Palantir, Spotify top new buys. Dow Jones Futures surging.
data.description: The stock market reached all-time highs as major indexes surged, driven by a significant Nvidia agreement and the second-day response from the Federal Reserve. Palantir and Spotify were among the top new purchases in the market. Dow Jones Futures indicated a strong performance, with investors showing optimism following these developments.

data.title: Stock market rallies with Russell 2000 hitting new high; Dow Jones up after jobless claims. Nvidia stock surges on Intel stake.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose along with other indexes following a surprising decrease in weekly jobless claims. Nvidia's stock surged due to its stake in Intel. The Russell 2000 reached a new high in today's stock market, with certain chip stocks also experiencing notable growth. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily in a live coverage report.

data.title: ZEVAS returning to Los Angeles Auto Show with consumers voting on top zero-emission vehicles on October 1.
data.description: The 2025 LA Auto Show is introducing a showcase of zero-emission vehicles, emphasizing the advancement of clean mobility. Consumers will have the opportunity to vote for their top choices in five different awards programs, beginning on October 1. This event is expected to feature a variety of categories, promoting the future of eco-friendly transportation.

data.title: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. reveals election of directors and annual meeting results on September 18, 2025 in Kellogg, Idaho.
data.description: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. disclosed the outcomes of its recent annual stockholders' meeting on September 18, 2025, in Kellogg, Idaho. The gathering saw voting on various agenda items relevant to the company's interests. Bunker Hill, identified by its market codes (TSX-V: BNKR |OTCQB: BHLL), revealed the details without specifying the specifics.
